category_sources: source_facts.description says C++17 Distributed Hash Table implementation; official README says OpenDHT is a lightweight C++17 distributed hash table implementation.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and project title use OpenDHT.
docs_sources: Official README says documentation is in the GitHub wiki and points to BUILD.md for build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/savoirfairelinux/opendht; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify C++17 DHT, distributed in-memory data store, REST API, and C/Rust/Python bindings.
